title: Talking to a Bank Teller
description: Practice visiting a bank branch to ask about your account, make a simple request, or get help with a transaction.
context: You are at a bank during business hours. You need help with your checking account — perhaps checking a balance, depositing a check, or asking about fees. The teller greets you at the counter.
opening_line: Good afternoon! Welcome to First Community Bank. How can I help you today?
goal_state: user has stated what they need help with
user has provided their name or account information when asked
user has asked at least one clarifying question or confirmed details
user has thanked the teller and ended the interaction politely
success_criteria: User completes a clear bank counter conversation about their account
